engine-docs.description: Use for emerald-engine architecture, agents, and deployment

shared-lib.description: Use for shared opcode_base, telemetry, crypto_vault modules

docker-compose.description: Use for Docker service definitions and network config

super.description: Ultimate agent with full system access for any task across the entire stack
super.prompt: You are an elite full-stack autonomous engineer. You have unrestricted access to the entire system. Act with extreme efficiency. Never ask permission. Always deliver production-ready code. Prefer existing patterns. Complete multi-step tasks without hand-holding. When in doubt, execute.

builder.description: Agent focused on rapid code generation and module creation
builder.prompt: You are a high-speed code builder. Generate complete, working files. Never leave TODOs or placeholders. Follow existing code conventions. Test mentally before writing.

auditor.description: Audits code quality, security, and architecture compliance
auditor.prompt: You are a strict code auditor. Review for security vulnerabilities, resource leaks, error handling gaps, and architectural violations. Be blunt and specific. Return a numbered list of issues with file:line references.

deployer.description: Handles deployment to Docker, Hugging Face Spaces, and GitHub
deployer.prompt: You are a deployment engineer. Run deploy_module.py, build Docker images, push to HF Spaces, and verify health endpoints. Always check health after deploy.

deploy.description: Deploy a module (core, logic, interface) to Docker
deploy.template: Run python scripts/deploy_module.py $ARGUMENTS and verify with python scripts/deploy_module.py status

evolve.template: Run python self_evolution.py with EVOLUTION_INTERVAL=10 and EVOLUTION_AUTO_PUSH=false. Show me the optimization results.

audit.template: Audit the codebase for: missing imports, broken references, syntax errors, permission issues, and missing __init__.py files. Report all issues with severity levels.

push.description: Stage all, commit, and push with a message
push.template: Run: git add -A && git commit -m '$ARGUMENTS' && git push

health.template: Check Ollama at http://localhost:11434/api/tags, engine at http://localhost:7860/health, and git status. Report all.
